content.en:
After a period of time, Ye Tian returned to the Death Void outside the Eternal Realm, and at this time he had to explore the path.

He couldn't come back from the passage of Taihao Tianzhu Palace, so he had to spare the road to the passage he had discovered.

The distance is not very far, but even if it is a short road, you must move forward carefully, otherwise you will encounter a death crisis if you are not careful.

In the Void of Death, even the distance of the gaze needs to be explored, otherwise you will encounter mortal danger.

Therefore, Ye Tian used a replica body to explore the route, looking for a safe path.

In this way, as dangers were discovered everywhere, Ye Tian finally found a safe road and successfully returned.

......

Eternal borders.

Ye Tian came back, and he also successfully brought back those resource treasures "Two Three Zero".

At this moment, he breathed a sigh of relief.

At the very least, he was safe within the boundaries of the Eternal Realm, unlike the Void of Death, where there was danger everywhere, and there was almost no safe place.

Now, these resources are truly his.

There are many resources that can help him refine the Eternal Dao Seed this time, not only is he enough, but he can also help his relatives refine the Eternal Dao Seed, improve his cultivation, and break the realm.

In addition, you can also cultivate some more high-level realm gods.

It can be said that taking out some resources casually is enough to create a group of high-level realm gods.

And so.

Ye Tian distributed these resources, most of the resources naturally belonged to him, some of them were given to his wives and children, and a very small number were sent to the Terran Temple, and any middle-level peak realm god could be exchanged for resources that would help them impact the high-level realm gods.

As long as the resources are sufficient, it won't be long before the human race will give birth to many high-level realm gods.

The years that followed.

Ye Tian regularly sent a batch of resources back, and those copied bodies were still exploring resources in the super dimensional treasure land.

A super dimensional treasure land, there are definitely a lot of resources in it, and it can't be explored in a short period of time.

It's just that he doesn't dare to step into the core area of the super dimensional treasure land, and there are extremely powerful super dimensional creatures in many areas, and he doesn't dare to go over, there are not too many areas that he can really explore.

But as long as he is not done exploring, he can find resources, and there will be gains.

Another period of time has passed.

this day.

There was good news that a middle-level peak realm god of the human race had broken through to a high-level realm god cultivation.

And this was just the beginning, in the following years, one after another of the Terran Peak Realm God broke through to the high-level Realm God.

Although it took a lot of resources, Ye Tian was willing to do it, after all, it was relatively easy for him to obtain these resources.

Even the supreme forces did not have the same easy access to resources as him, like the Sumeru Realm Gods, they were reluctant to give these resources to those mid-level peak realm gods.

After all, for the peak realm god, it doesn't make sense to give birth to a high-level realm god, unless he is a descendant of his own relatives, he will be willing to take out a little.

But Ye Tian was too good to the human race, so he was willing to take out so many resources.

And Ye Tian's wife, Xiao Yue, and her son and daughter have these resources to refine the Eternal Dao Seed, it will be easier to refine the Eternal Dao Seed, and it will not take too long to refine the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit, so as to condense the eighth Eternal Realm Spirit.

One Billion Solstice Era!

Two billion to the Dao Era!

Five billion to the Dao Era!

At this time, Ye Tian had stopped exploring the super dimensional treasure land and left directly.

Because he has explored all the places he can explore, and other places are places he is not qualified to explore, and once he forcibly explores, he will definitely die.

So, there was no point in him staying in this super-dimensional treasure land.

Relying on this super dimensional treasure land, he has obtained a large amount of resources, and helped the human race give birth to twenty-one high-level realm gods, and his wife and children are about to break through their cultivation and condense the eighth eternal realm spirit.

As for Ye Tian himself, he had already raised the Eternal Dao Seed to the current limit. []

He was going to hit the bottleneck on the same day to condense the ninth Eternal Realm Spirit, and once the condensation was successful, his cultivation would reach the peak realm of a high-level realm god.

......

Death Void.

Super Dimensional Treasure Land.

The Sumeru Realm God brought a group of high-level Realm Gods here, and a few of them were high-level Realm Gods who came here last time0 .....

These high-level realm gods have tried the benefits of those treasure resources, and their cultivation has risen sharply one by one, and they are about to reach the limit of high-level peak realm gods, and they are qualified to impact the peak realm gods, or they have already reached the time to impact the peak realm gods, but they have not yet grasped the impact, and they are ready to find some super-dimensional resources that will help condense the tenth eternal realm spirit, so they dare to take risks.

Soon, the Sumeru Realm God came to the Chaowei Treasure Land on the Boundless Sailing Ship and let these high-level realm gods enter.

Time passes, after a period of time.

A high-level pinnacle realm god has returned with heavy damage.

"Where's the resources!"

The Sumeru Realm God asked.

"No resources!" the high-level peak realm god said with some annoyance.

He went in for so long, but after looking around, he didn't find any resources.

What a treasure land, it's a dangerous forbidden land with no resources at all.

This time the resources were not obtained, and they were severely damaged, and the Eternal Dao Species were seriously traumatized, and I don't know how many long years it will take to hope for repair, so it's no wonder that he is not annoyed!

"No resources?"

The Sumeru Realm God frowned, didn't think too much, and only thought that this high-level realm god was unlucky, and he just happened to encounter danger, and he had been living for a while, so he didn't get any resources.

But as a high-level realm god came back from entering this super dimensional treasure land, they all said that they had not obtained resources, and the resources found by only one or two high-level realm gods were also extremely ordinary, and he couldn't even look down on 0.4.

After a long period of time, most of the high-level realm gods remained here forever, but the resources they obtained were not worth mentioning at all.

He also suspected that these high-level realm gods deliberately deceived him, but under the influence of the experiment, these high-level realm gods did not dare to do this, if they really did this, they would definitely be sworn to devour the eternal Dao species, but all the high-level realm gods were not counterattacked, which means that they are not lying.

Gradually, he had a guess in his mind, but he was not sure.

So, the Sumeru Realm God came back with this group of high-level realm gods, but every high-level realm god was very annoyed, but he just didn't dare to be angry with the Sumeru realm god.

After coming back.

The gods of the Sumeru realm immediately held a meeting with other peak realm gods to discuss this matter.
